title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netmeds - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
